headlines.text: Trump at Cabinet meeting: 'I don't care about the midterms' as Iran deal talks drag on
White House calls Iranian state TV's draft peace memo a 'total fabrication'
Ken Paxton crushes John Cornyn by 28 points in Texas GOP Senate runoff, sets up November showdown
Dow hits fresh record as oil tumbles on Iran deal hopes; S&P 500 and Nasdaq slip
National gas average hits $4.46 — up 54% since the Iran war began in late February
Euphoria Season 3 finale trailer drops — series widely expected to end on May 31
Israel kills Mohammed Odeh, Hamas's newly appointed armed wing chief, in Gaza operation
Federal court blocks Alabama from using new congressional map, citing intentional racial discrimination
Trump proposes government-wide NDA for all federal employees — OPM posts draft to Federal Register
Micron Technology extends its jaw-dropping rally; shares have tripled in 2026 on AI chip mania

stories.hed: Trump Says He Won't Rush Iran Deal Because He Doesn't 'Care About the Midterms'
stories.dek: At a Cabinet meeting Wednesday, Trump warned Iran that 'outlasting' him won't work, while the White House called a leaked draft peace memo circulated by Iranian state TV a 'total fabrication.' Iran's top negotiator just got back from Qatar trying to unlock $24 billion in frozen assets, and the Strait of Hormuz remains partially shut — a detail everyone's wallet already knew.

stories.hed: Israel Kills Hamas Armed Wing Chief Mohammed Odeh in Gaza Strike
stories.dek: The IDF confirmed the killing of Mohammed Odeh, Hamas's newly appointed military commander, in a Tuesday operation in Gaza — just weeks after his predecessor was killed in a similar strike. Israel also issued fresh evacuation orders for the Lebanese city of Nabatieh amid continued operations against Hezbollah in southern Lebanon.

stories.hed: Ken Paxton Defeats John Cornyn by 28 Points in Texas Senate Primary Runoff
stories.dek: Trump-backed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton routed incumbent Senator John Cornyn in Tuesday's GOP runoff, making Cornyn the second Republican senator to lose his seat in under two weeks. Paxton will now face Democrat James Talarico in November in a race that could decide Senate control.

stories.hed: Trump Administration Proposes Government-Wide NDA for All Federal Workers
stories.dek: The Office of Personnel Management published a draft nondisclosure agreement Tuesday that would bar federal employees from sharing any nonpublic, confidential, or sensitive internal information — going beyond existing classified and unclassified categories. Legal scholars are already lining up to explain why this is either totally normal or completely unprecedented, depending on who's funding their think tank.

stories.hed: Trump Is Personally Fine With the Iran War Going Long — His Portfolio Apparently Less So
stories.dek: Trump told his Cabinet he doesn't care about midterm pressure and won't be rushed into a deal, while simultaneously demanding Iran agree to Abraham Accords expansion, no Russian or Chinese uranium transfers, and full Hormuz reopening before any sanctions relief. Some observers note the goalposts have now lapped the field twice.

markets.context: Oil cratered on Iran deal murmurs (later denied), lifting the Dow to a record while chip stocks faded and dragged the S&P 500 and Nasdaq slightly into the red.

gas.note: Gas is 54% more expensive than before the Iran war started — your commute is now technically a defense expenditure.

popCulture.hed: Euphoria Season 3 Finale Trailer Drops — and It Might Be the Show's Last Episode Ever
popCulture.dek: HBO released the first trailer for the May 31 finale, titled 'In God We Trust,' which runs 93 minutes and is widely rumored to be the series finale. The penultimate episode already killed off Nate Jacobs (Jacob Elordi) via snakebite while buried alive, which is exactly the kind of sentence that only makes sense on this show.

genZ.definition: Drake's new album ICEMAN dropped this month and spawned a viral real-world scavenger hunt around his cryptic 'Ice' art installations, which started appearing in cities with no explanation. Fans are documenting finds, reselling clues, and debating whether the album disses LeBron James — all of which is generating more engagement than the music itself.
genZ.usage: Trump denying the Iran peace memo is very 'ICEMAN drop energy' — release something huge, immediately say it's not real, watch everyone spiral.

tldr: Trump told his Cabinet he won't rush an Iran deal because he doesn't care about the midterms, while the White House called Iran's leaked draft peace memo a fabrication — leaving oil markets, negotiators, and everyone paying $4.46 a gallon deeply confused. Back home, Ken Paxton torched John Cornyn by 28 points in Texas, Euphoria is about to end forever, and the Dow hit a record because apparently some things are going fine.
